description: Calendar of events for OLE content planning. Ties local Barbados events + international dates to content themes.

events.name: New Year's Day
events.content_hook: New year, new digital strategy for Barbados businesses

events.content_hook: Honouring Barbados' first Prime Minister — building a digital legacy

events.content_hook: Love your customers enough to give them a website that works

events.content_hook: Celebrating 60 years — time for a digital independence too

events.content_hook: Working smarter, not harder — AI agents that work while you rest

events.content_hook: The rhythm of Barbados — sync your marketing to the island's heartbeat

events.content_hook: The state of digital marketing in Barbados — where we stand

events.content_hook: Transparency in digital marketing — your customers deserve to know

events.content_hook: Teaching Barbados' next generation of digital natives

events.content_hook: How Barbados restaurants can use AI to reduce waste and increase orders

events.name: Halloween
events.content_hook: Your current website is scarier than anything on Halloween

events.content_hook: Honouring Barbados' heroes — who will be the digital hero your business needs?

events.name: World Kindness Day
events.content_hook: Kindness in business — a fast website is the kindest thing you can do for your customers

events.content_hook: Using digital platforms responsibly — every business has a role to play

events.name: Thanksgiving (US)
events.content_hook: Thankful for Barbados' resilient business community — and giving back with a free digital audit

events.name: Independence Day (Barbados)
events.content_hook: Celebrating Barbados' independence — has your business claimed its digital independence?

events.name: Start of Hurricane Season End / Small Business Saturday (post-Thanksgiving)
events.content_hook: Hurricane season taught us: resilience is non-negotiable. Same goes for your website.

events.content_hook: Is your website ready for Christmas shoppers? 0.4s load time means more sales under the tree.

events.name: Christmas Day
events.content_hook: A Bajan Christmas in a digital world — keeping traditions alive online

events.name: Boxing Day
events.content_hook: Boxing Day sales — your website is your best salesperson right now

events.content_hook: Looking back on 2026 — did your digital presence keep up with Barbados' growth?
